Off Calendar Apr-30-2007 Continued To May-14-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

For Court Supervision Of Conservatee'S Trust
Off Calendar Apr-27-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alvin Jackson (Temporary Conservator); Timothy Jackson (Conservatee); Mark Shustoff (Court-appointed Counsel for the Conservatee); Lillian Ng (Counsel for the Temporary Conservator).

Noting the same factors that merited the conservatorship of the estate (Case no. 288403), the Court granted the Petition for court supervision of the trust, setting the First Accounting filing deadline two weeks before June 5, 2007 for the accounting period February 22, 2006 to February 22, 2007 (signing the Order for same in open court). Bond was set at $170,000.00.

Judicial Officer: Commissioner Dorothy McMath; Reporter: Vicki Gross CSR# 5525; Court Investigator: Mary Quinn; Bailiff: None; Clerk: R. Michael Diles.

For Court Supervision Of Conservatee'S Trust
Off Calendar Apr-13-2006 Continued To Apr-27-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng (counsel for Petitioner Alvin Jackson).

Ms. Ng appeared for the purpose of continuing the hearing on this matter and to extend the order appointing temporary successor trustee. The Order for same was presented and signed in open court. The hearing was continued to April 27, 2006 at 9:00 a.m.

Judicial Officer: Judge John Dearman; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Court Investigator: Shauna Ford; Bailiff: None; Clerk: R. Michael Diles.
